Written Words

★★★★★

"Sherin's work is absolute perfection! The stain was incredibly dark and lasted almost two weeks. Everyone admired the custom portraits she drew for my big day."

Neha Kapoor

Bridal Client
★★★★★

"I have really sensitive skin so I was worried about chemical cones. Sherin's organic cones were so gentle, smelled amazing, and gave me a gorgeous mahogany stain."

Snigdha M.

Engagement Bride
★★★★★

"Not just a mehendi artist, but a true professional. She arrived on time, was so quick, yet the detailing was immaculate. Simply the best in the city!"

Rhea Sharma

Bridal Client
